name: Risotto with Gorgonzola and Pistachios
recipeIngredient: Freshly Ground Black Pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Saute the onion until translucent, about 3 minutes.
3. Add the rice and stir for 1 minute.
4. Add the white wine and stir until the liquid has evaporated.
5. Meanwhile, heat the chicken stock to a low simmer in a separate saucepan.
6. Reduce the heat, cover, and keep the stock warm.
7. Add 1/2 cup of stock to the rice and simmer until the liquid is absorbed, stirring frequently.
8. Continue adding the remaining stock, 1/2 cup at a time, in the same manner, allowing each addition to be completely absorbed before adding more. This should take about 30 minutes total. The rice will be done when tender but still slightly firm to the bite on the inside. Do not overcook it and remember that you may not need all of the stock or may need a bit more.
9. Add the crumbled Gorgonzola and stir until melted.
10. Remove from heat, season with pepper, and stir in the Parmesan, butter, and remaining 3 tbsp of chopped pistachios.
11. Transfer to a serving dish and sprinkle with the remaining pistachios.
